query: SELECT key, CASE WHEN key LIKE '%TOKEN%' OR key LIKE '%SID%' OR key LIKE '%SECRET%' THEN LEFT(value, 8) || '...' ELSE value END as value_preview FROM platform_config WHERE key LIKE 'TWILIO%' ORDER BY key;
